Rows: CAST(SUM(IIF(Age BETWEEN 13 AND 18, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Id)

gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Age BETWEEN 13 AND 18, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Id) FROM users
pred_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Age BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN Id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Id) AS percentage FROM users;
